# Suites that must NOT dominate the top results for menu_item_pattern.cpp
#
# These are unrelated component suites. Their presence in the TOP-5
# results indicates the ranking is broken (token overlap false positives).
#
# Matching rule: these strings must NOT appear in the top-5 project paths.

# Button-only suites — ButtonModifier doesn't share code with MenuItem
ace_ets_component_button
ace_ets_component_toggle

# Navigation — completely unrelated
ace_ets_component_navigation
ace_ets_component_navdestination

# Video/media — unrelated
ace_ets_component_video
